pkgmetadata.longdescription: ipython-autotimeTime everything in IPython Installationconsole pip install ipython-autotime ExamplespythonIn [1] load_ext autotimetime 264 s (started 2020-12-15 114436 +0100)In [2] x 1time 416 s (started 2020-12-15 114445 +0100)In [3] x 0---------------------------------------------------------------------------ZeroDivisionError Traceback (most recent call last)ipython-input-3-034eb0c6102b in module---- 1 x0ZeroDivisionError division by zerotime 88.7 ms (started 2020-12-15 114453 +0100) Want to turn it offpythonIn [4] unload_ext autotime
